description: You are a QA Manager at an aerospace firm. Configure the workflow for the 'Safety Critical Change' tracker by using the 'Design Request' tracker's workflow as a template. For the 'Junior Engineer' role on the 'Safety Critical Change' tracker, ensure they cannot move tickets directly from 'New' to 'Approved', but can still move tickets from 'New' to 'Review'. All other transitions from the original workflow must be preserved.
